chunks.title: Trust in God as Refuge
chunks.reason: A unified psalm of David expressing personal trust in God's stability and exhorting the soul to wait silently.

chunks.title: Vanity of Human Status
chunks.reason: An argument contrasting the fleeting nature of low and high status with the reality of divine judgment.

chunks.title: God's Strength and Justice
chunks.reason: A concluding oracle affirming that strength belongs to God and He repays according to one's work.
